subject: tieng-anh
topic: Ôn tập giữa học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh lớp 4

questions.question: What does 'tall' mean? (Từ 'tall' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'áo khoác'? ('áo khoác' tiếng Anh là gì?)
Which word can describe hair? (Từ nào có thể tả mái tóc?)
What can a fish do? (Con cá có thể làm gì?)
Complete: 'I ___ ride a bike.' (Em có thể đi xe đạp — điền 'can')
Match the clothes word with its meaning (Nối từ quần áo với nghĩa)
Choose the comparative: 'An elephant is ___ than a cat.' (to hơn)
Answer 'Can you swim?' when you can (Trả lời 'Can you swim?' khi em biết bơi)
Write 'đôi giày' in English (Viết 'đôi giày' bằng tiếng Anh): ___
What does 'short' mean? (Từ 'short' nghĩa là gì?)
Choose the correct sentence describing a person (Chọn câu tả người đúng)
Match the adjective with its meaning (Nối tính từ với nghĩa)

questions.passage: This is my friend Tom. He is tall and has short brown hair. He can play football very well, but he can't swim. He is friendly and kind.
questions.question: What does Tom look like? (Tom trông như thế nào?)

questions.passage: This is my friend Tom. He is tall and has short brown hair. He can play football very well, but he can't swim. He is friendly and kind.
questions.question: What can Tom do well? (Tom làm gì giỏi?)

questions.passage: This is my friend Tom. He is tall and has short brown hair. He can play football very well, but he can't swim. He is friendly and kind.
questions.question: What can't Tom do? (Tom không làm được gì?)
You want to ask if your friend can dance (Em muốn hỏi bạn có biết nhảy không)
